pi_items.source: Verified by reading verifier.py and export_result.sh which explicitly check for the presence of the string 'asthma' in the added condition's name.
Verified by reading verifier.py which explicitly checks if the status of the 'asthma' condition contains the string 'active'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on an OpenMRS electronic health records environment populated with synthetic patient data from Synthea. The verifier checks that a new condition named 'Asthma' (case-insensitive) was created during the task duration, and that its status is set to 'Active'.
